creator: crocusino@seznam.cz
text:
When trying to link to libgfortran (by linking to blas or lapack or openblas or gotoblas ...), the following appears:

//usr/local/lib/gcc48/libgfortran.so.3: undefined reference to `__multf3@GCC_4.6.0'

(plus another 14 undefined references of the very same kind)

I did not install anything from the ports tree, I use only binary pkgs.

It seems sth has not been fully recompiled towards gcc-4.8 in binary distribution.
